title: No-keyword negative control: ASK-fallthrough must not yield 0.85-confidence ASK
failure_mode: ASK fallthrough at 0.85 on no-keyword input erases the distinction between 'I need clarification' and 'I recognised nothing' (FR-006)
invariant: ASK is not the fallthrough verdict
rationale: Negative control. A future classifier that produces ASK at 0.85 here cannot be trusted to surface real clarifying needs.
